function v(v)return h[v-(-860448-(-882859))]end for v,M in ipairs({{121588-121587,-905076-(-906680)};{-389741+389742,686689+-686530};{-502331+502491;-337004-(-338608)}})do while h[M[418886+-418885]],h[M[277625-277623]],M[-619108-(-619109)],M[-869665-(-869667)]=h[M[693555+-693553]],h[M[-12789+12790]],M[-472131-(-472132)]+(-775016+775017),M[-633193+633195]-(-384033-(-384034))end end end end end M=#K return r(w)end,function(h,v)local r=O(v)local g=function(g,Z)return M(h,{g,Z},v,r)end return g end,function(h)for v=284464+-284463,#h,285644-285643 do
